turn.description: Freeciv turn number observed during the turn.

phase_done.description: True only if the agent successfully called bin/game phase-done.

turn_summary.description: Short factual summary of what happened during this turn. This is for logs only and is not persistent player memory.

private_intent.description: Same private note submitted through bin/game phase-done --intent. Stored by the harness as a private match artifact, not persistent player memory.

public_message.description: Exact public in-game chat message sent this turn when public turn message mode is enabled; otherwise an empty string.
